message:
test(guard): add E2E tests for guard command

Add comprehensive E2E tests for the `cm guard` command that installs
trauma guard hooks for Project Hot Stove:

Tests cover (11 total):
- guardCommand entry point (missing --install flag errors)
- installGuard successful installation
- Idempotent installation (running twice doesn't duplicate)
- Error when no .claude directory exists
- JSON output mode with valid JSON response
- Malformed settings.json graceful handling
- Preserving existing settings.json content
- Silent mode (no output, still installs)
- Silent mode with missing .claude (no error output)
- Full CLI integration (cm guard --install --json)

Uses E2ELogger for detailed logging and withTempDir for isolation.
All 11 tests pass.

Closes cass_memory_system-rsgy

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
